headline: Assessing Texas Instruments (TXN) Valuation After Stifel Upgrade And Strengthening AI Infrastructure Story
summary: Texas Instruments (TXN) is back in focus after an analyst upgrade from Stifel highlighted improving free cash flow, better operational efficiency, and progress in an analog upcycle following years of heavy capital spending. See our latest analysis for Texas Instruments. The Stifel upgrade and rising institutional interest have arrived alongside firm share price momentum, with the stock at US$208.90 and a 1 year total shareholder return of 27.14% and a 5 year total shareholder return of...

headline: Stifel Sets a $250 Price Target on Texas Instruments. Is This Semiconductor Giant Ready to Run?

headline: Stifel ups Texas Instruments to Buy, sees FCF inflection as heavy capex cycle ends
summary: Investing.com -- Stifel upgraded Texas Instruments to Buy from Hold on Tuesday, raising its price target to $250 from $215, citing an expected inflection in free cash flow (FCF) generation as the chipmaker exits a prolonged capital investment cycle.
